name: Totakeke
description: TOTAKEKE ($TOTAKEKE) is a unique meme token on the Ethereum blockchain, designed to blend humor with community engagement. Inspired by the concept of the "True King," TOTAKEKE aims to create a vibrant space for meme enthusiasts and crypto investors alike. The token's purpose is to not only entertain but also to foster a strong community where holders can participate in interactive events and benefit from exclusive rewards.
